title: Senior Gameplay Engineer
description:
About The Role

The Office of Technology Enablement (OTE), a Disney division, seeks an experienced gameplay engineer to develop XR experiences across Disney's business segments. This hands-on position involves R&D projects and collaborations with various business units to create interactive experiences centered on Disney characters and properties. The role reports to the Director of Development.

Key Responsibilities

- Implement interactive experiences using Disney's character and world portfolio
- Write production code while collaborating directly with design, production, and art teams
- Work primarily with Unreal Engine, adapting to ecosystem limitations and future enhancements
- Support designers as their primary technical resource during development
- Solve hardware constraints creatively while maintaining team morale
- Collaborate with engineering and creative teams to ensure implementation quality and stability
- Advocate for audience experience and Disney values, prioritizing guest satisfaction

Required Qualifications

- 5+ years developing console, PC, mobile games, or interactive digital entertainment
- Native C++ proficiency with Unreal Engine 4/5+
- Shipped commercial products as a hands-on programmer; authored major gameplay systems
- Prototyping experience; understands prototype vs. production requirements
- Production-level expertise in: C++ optimization, memory management, inheritance; client/server architecture; game mathematics
- Ability to mentor engineers
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience

Preferred Qualifications

- Released products for Apple Vision Pro, Meta Quest, or other VR platforms
- Graphics programming, mobile development, or online services experience
- Unreal content development and publishing experience
- Broad XR platform knowledge
